title: ML / AI Engineer
description: Build intelligent systems using machine learning and artificial intelligence. From Python fundamentals to deploying production ML models, this roadmap covers the complete ML/AI engineering journey.

nodes.title: Python Programming
nodes.description: Master Python — data types, control flow, functions, OOP, and popular libraries (NumPy, Pandas).

nodes.title: Mathematics for ML
nodes.description: Linear algebra (vectors, matrices), calculus (derivatives, gradients), probability, and statistics.

nodes.title: Data Analysis (Pandas & NumPy)
nodes.description: Data manipulation, cleaning, exploration, and analysis with Pandas and NumPy.

nodes.title: Data Visualization
nodes.description: Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly for creating informative visualizations and exploratory data analysis.

nodes.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
nodes.description: Supervised vs unsupervised learning, bias-variance tradeoff, cross-validation, and the ML workflow.

nodes.title: Supervised Learning
nodes.description: Linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, SVMs, and ensemble methods.

nodes.title: Unsupervised Learning
nodes.description: K-Means clustering, PCA, DBSCAN, hierarchical clustering, and dimensionality reduction.

nodes.title: Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Feature selection, creation, scaling, encoding, handling missing data, and domain-specific feature engineering.

nodes.title: Model Evaluation
nodes.description: Metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC-ROC), confusion matrices, cross-validation, and hyperparameter tuning.

nodes.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals
nodes.description: Neural networks, backpropagation, activation functions, loss functions, and optimization algorithms (SGD, Adam).

nodes.title: PyTorch
nodes.description: Build neural networks with PyTorch — tensors, autograd, training loops, and GPU acceleration.

nodes.title: TensorFlow / Keras
nodes.description: TensorFlow and Keras for building and training deep learning models with high-level APIs.

nodes.title: Convolutional Neural Networks
nodes.description: CNNs for image classification, object detection, and image segmentation.

nodes.title: Natural Language Processing
nodes.description: Text processing, word embeddings, RNNs, LSTMs, transformers, and attention mechanisms.

nodes.title: Transformers & LLMs
nodes.description: BERT, GPT, fine-tuning large language models, prompt engineering, and the transformer architecture.

nodes.title: Computer Vision
nodes.description: Image classification, object detection (YOLO), segmentation, facial recognition, and video analysis.

nodes.title: Reinforcement Learning
nodes.description: Q-learning, policy gradients, deep reinforcement learning, and building game-playing agents.

nodes.title: MLOps
nodes.description: ML model lifecycle management — experiment tracking, model versioning, automated training pipelines.

nodes.title: Model Deployment
nodes.description: Deploy ML models as APIs (FastAPI, Flask), containerize with Docker, and serve with TensorFlow Serving or TorchServe.

nodes.title: Scaling ML Systems
nodes.description: Distributed training, model optimization (quantization, pruning), GPU clusters, and serving at scale.

nodes.title: AI Ethics & Responsible AI
nodes.description: Bias in ML, fairness, explainability (SHAP, LIME), privacy, and responsible AI development.

nodes.title: Kaggle & Competitions
nodes.description: Practice ML on real datasets, participate in competitions, and learn from top performers' notebooks.

nodes.title: Git & Experiment Tracking
nodes.description: Version control for code and experiments — DVC, Git LFS, and ML-specific versioning workflows.

nodes.title: SQL for Data Scientists
nodes.description: SQL for extracting and preparing training data from databases.

nodes.title: Generative AI / GANs
nodes.description: Generative Adversarial Networks, diffusion models, and generative AI techniques.

nodes.title: Cloud ML Services
nodes.description: AWS SageMaker, Google Cloud AI Platform, or Azure ML for managed ML infrastructure.

nodes.title: Real-time ML
nodes.description: Online learning, streaming data pipelines, real-time inference, and model monitoring in production.
